---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new Premiere Pro tool or MCP feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

How would you use this in your video editing workflow?

## Premiere Pro Reference

- **Menu path:** (e.g., Effect > Color Correction > Lumetri Color)
- **ExtendScript API:** (if known, e.g., `app.project.activeSequence.videoTracks`)
- **Related docs:** (links to Adobe documentation if available)

## Priority

- [ ] Nice-to-have
- [ ] Important for my workflow
- [ ] Critical / blocking

## Proposed Tool Name

If you have a suggestion for the MCP tool name (e.g., `premiere_apply_lumetri_preset`).

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples of the workflow you're trying to automate.
